'''鈭歸-th-w-w''' ('''kawathwewoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:excreate|excreate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-th-w-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:excreate|excreate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歸-th-w-w
|-
! Lemma
| kawathwewoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiwathwewoko|thiwathwewoko]] || [[word:jiwathwewoko|jiwathwewoko]] || [[word:shiwathwewoko|shiwathwewoko]] || [[word:kiwathwewoko|kiwathwewoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuwathwewoko|thuthuwathwewoko]] || [[word:jujuwathwewoko|jujuwathwewoko]] || [[word:shushuwathwewoko|shushuwathwewoko]] || [[word:kukuwathwewoko|kukuwathwewoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuwathwewoko|thuwathwewoko]] || [[word:juwathwewoko|juwathwewoko]] || [[word:shuwathwewoko|shuwathwewoko]] || [[word:kuwathwewoko|kuwathwewoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuwathwewoko|thuwathwewoko]] || [[word:juwathwewoko|juwathwewoko]] || [[word:shuwathwewoko|shuwathwewoko]] || [[word:kuwathwewoko|kuwathwewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thewathwewoko|thewathwewoko]] || [[word:jewathwewoko|jewathwewoko]] || [[word:shewathwewoko|shewathwewoko]] || [[word:kewathwewoko|kewathwewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothowathwewoko|thothowathwewoko]] || [[word:jojowathwewoko|jojowathwewoko]] || [[word:shoshowathwewoko|shoshowathwewoko]] || [[word:kokowathwewoko|kokowathwewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thowathwewoko|thowathwewoko]] || [[word:jowathwewoko|jowathwewoko]] || [[word:showathwewoko|showathwewoko]] || [[word:kowathwewoko|kowathwewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thowathwewoko|thowathwewoko]] || [[word:jowathwewoko|jowathwewoko]] || [[word:showathwewoko|showathwewoko]] || [[word:kowathwewoko|kowathwewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙wathwewoko|th忙wathwewoko]] || [[word:j忙wathwewoko|j忙wathwewoko]] || [[word:sh忙wathwewoko|sh忙wathwewoko]] || [[word:k忙wathwewoko|k忙wathwewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathawathwewoko|thathawathwewoko]] || [[word:jajawathwewoko|jajawathwewoko]] || [[word:shashawathwewoko|shashawathwewoko]] || [[word:kakawathwewoko|kakawathwewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thawathwewoko|thawathwewoko]] || [[word:jawathwewoko|jawathwewoko]] || [[word:shawathwewoko|shawathwewoko]] || [[word:kawathwewoko|kawathwewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thawathwewoko|thawathwewoko]] || [[word:jawathwewoko|jawathwewoko]] || [[word:shawathwewoko|shawathwewoko]] || [[word:kawathwewoko|kawathwewoko]]
|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shawathwewithi|shawathwewithi]] || [[word:shawathwewiji|shawathwewiji]] || [[word:shawathwewishi|shawathwewishi]] || [[word:shawathwewiki|shawathwewiki]]
